author: Chiang Shun Fan
description: Upload local Obsidian media to Cloudflare R2 and rewrite note links automatically. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: fab34
manifest.description: Automatically upload local media assets to Cloudflare R2 and rewrite Markdown links.
manifest.name: R2 Media Sync

name: R2 Media Sync

releases.author: fab34
releases.description: Raised minAppVersion to 1.13.0 and switched settings tab back to the official getSettingDefinitions layout API.

releases.author: fab34
releases.description: Fix: Replace settings tab this.update() with standard this.display() for older Obsidian version compatibility (down to v1.6.6+). Fix: Eliminate TypeScript unsafe linter warnings.

releases.author: fab34
releases.description: Fix: Resolve Obsidian API compatibility issues (getSettingDefinitions) and replace globalThis with window for popout window compatibility.

releases.author: fab34
releases.description: Enable auto-monitoring on mobile and fix version compatibility

releases.author: fab34
releases.description:
## Changes
- Replaced hard-coded config-folder exclusions with the vault's current config directory.
- Switched settings rendering to Obsidian's getSettingDefinitions() API.
- Raised the minimum app version to 1.13.0 for the new settings API.
- Removed direct Vault.trash() fallback in favor of FileManager.trashFile().
- Replaced globalThis.crypto access with window.crypto for popup-window compatibility.

## Verification
- npm run build
- git diff --check
- Graphify rebuild

releases.author: fab34
releases.description:
## R2 Media Sync 0.3.0

- Added mobile support by removing the desktop-only plugin flag and replacing Node crypto usage with Web Crypto.
- Added mobile-safe local cleanup fallback for removing uploaded images from the vault.
- Shortened the desktop status bar display to an icon with compact state text and full details in the tooltip.
- Includes the reliability, failed upload log, hash reuse, language, cleanup mode, and scan-scope improvements listed in CHANGELOG.md.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: fab34
releases.description:
## What's new

- Added upload retries with configurable attempt count.
- Added failed upload logging, a failed upload details modal, and commands to show or clear failures.
- Added hash-based upload reuse to avoid uploading identical image content again.
- Added a status bar item for recent sync activity.
- Added interface language selection: Auto, English, and Traditional Chinese.
- Added local cleanup modes: move uploaded local files to Obsidian trash or to a review folder.
- Added a command to clear the local review folder.
- Documented vault scanning scope and exclusions more explicitly.

## Notes

This release keeps the plugin focused on generated/imported local media workflows and remains desktop-only.

releases.author: fab34
releases.description:
## Review fix

- Removed the settings tab heading to satisfy community review wording rules.

## Assets

Download manifest.json, main.js, and styles.css for manual installation.

releases.author: fab34
releases.description:
## Review fixes

- Renamed the settings page heading from the plugin name to "Settings".
- Added validation for stored plugin data before merging settings to reduce unsafe assignment warnings.

## Assets

Download manifest.json, main.js, and styles.css for manual installation.

releases.author: fab34
releases.description:
## Review fixes

- Removed the word "Obsidian" from the manifest description.
- Replaced direct settings heading DOM creation with the Setting API.
- Read the vault config directory from app.vault.configDir instead of assuming .obsidian.
- Use fileManager.trashFile for local cleanup.
- Removed the builtin-modules dev dependency.
- Tightened EzImage settings parsing and async callback handling.

## Assets

Download manifest.json, main.js, and styles.css for manual installation.

releases.author: fab34
releases.description: Release 0.1.2 for Obsidian Community Plugins review.

releases.author: fab34
releases.description:
## Changes

- Fixed scan notice spam so bulk scans show one summary notice.
- Added community submission notes and clearer BRAT/manual installation docs.

## Installation assets

Download `manifest.json`, `main.js`, and `styles.css` from this release and place them in `.obsidian/plugins/r2-media-sync/`.
